# Government Polytechnic, Kinnaur

> AICTE-approved, HPTSB-affiliated government polytechnic in Himachal Pradesh offering 3-year diploma programs in Civil and Mechanical Engineering.

GP Kinnaur is a state-run technical institute under the Department of Technical Education, Himachal Pradesh, currently operating from a camp campus at Government Polytechnic Rohru, Distt. Shimla.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Institute overview, programs and announcements.
- [About](/about): History, vision, accreditation and facilities.
- [Admissions](/admissions): Eligibility, fees, dates and counselling steps.
- [Civil Engineering Department](/departments/1): Curriculum, labs, careers and faculty.
- [Mechanical Engineering Department](/departments/2): Curriculum, labs, careers and faculty.
- [Faculty](/staff/faculty): Teaching faculty profiles.
- [Administrative Staff](/staff/admin): Administrative team.
- [Non-Teaching Staff](/staff/non-teaching): Support staff.
- [Committees](/staff/committees): Institutional committees.
- [Alumni](/alumni): Placed alumni working across the industry.
- [Alumni Registration](/alumni/register): Registration form for alumni.
- [Anti-Ragging](/anti-ragging): Anti-ragging policy, helpline and committee.
- [Contact](/contact): Address, phone, email and contact form.
